author: codex

scope.selection_note: Focused on the early/sample entity duplicate_global_identity issues named for identity222 before the larger MTA parent-contamination cluster. This artifact proposes only high-confidence alias_merge or do_not_merge decisions and leaves ambiguous/already-guarded neighbors in skipped_review_only.

current_duplicate_snapshot.method: Read-only LOG.md checkpoint after identity221 plus read-only inspection of data/identity-review candidate_edges.jsonl and records.jsonl; no validate/materialize/export/provider command was run.
current_duplicate_snapshot.log_checkpoint: After identity221, validate was recorded at 139 issues, all duplicate_global_identity: corridor=1, entity=138.
current_duplicate_snapshot.candidate_edge_snapshot: data/identity-review/candidate_edges.jsonl generated 2026-06-23T14:08 local file timestamp; used only as validator evidence for the named early entity pairs.

scope.write_limit: Exactly one artifact was written: data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch222-early-entity-prep.json. No overrides, LOG, manifest, canonical JSONL, DB, wiki, materialized output, export output, or validation output was mutated.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_audit-committee-sorin and entity_catherine-sheridan-115226 share identity key entity_lisa-sorin.

source_evidence.quote: Hon. John-Ross Rizzo Hon. Michael Fleischer Hon. Lisa Sorin
Interim President Catherine Sheridan

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: The shared Lisa Sorin key is contamination on the Catherine Sheridan record. Lisa Sorin and Catherine Sheridan are distinct people with separate board/agency contexts.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Person-name contamination should be suppressed; do not alias different MTA board or agency officials merely because a member roster polluted another person record.

messages: Global entity records entity_catherine-sheridan-115226 and entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels share identity key entity_catherine-sheridan.
Global entity records entity_catherine-sheridan-115226 and entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels share identity key entity_catherine-sheridan-president-bridges-and-tunnels.

source_evidence.quote: Catherine T. Sheridan, P.E., Interim President
The legal name of MTA Bridges and Tunnels is Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Catherine Sheridan is a person/official; MTA Bridges and Tunnels/TBTA is an agency. Role text naming a president of the agency is affiliation evidence, not identity.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep agency leadership people distinct from the agency they lead.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_department-of-buses and entity_dept-of-subways-crichlow share identity key entity_mta-nyct.

source_evidence.quote: NYC Transit Department of Buses ("DOB") and MTA Bus Company
Requesting Department: Department of Subways, Demetrius Crichlow

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Department of Buses and Department of Subways/Demetrius Crichlow are different NYCT organizational/person-context records. The broad NYCT key is parent-agency contamination.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not collapse NYCT subdepartments or department-head/person records into each other through the parent NYCT key.

messages: Global entity records entity_department-of-buses and entity_mta-nyct share identity key entity_mta-nyct.
Global entity records entity_department-of-buses and entity_mta-nyct share identity key entity_new-york-city-transit-authority.

source_evidence.quote: New York City Transit Department of Buses & Department of Subways
MTA New York City Transit (NYCT)

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: NYCT Department of Buses is a subunit/context under NYCT, not the same canonical identity as the New York City Transit Authority.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Parent/subunit relations should be represented separately; do not merge departments into the parent agency.

messages: Global entity records entity_annual-report-2021-lirr and entity_long-island-committee share identity key entity_long-island-rail-rd-committee.
Global entity records entity_annual-report-2021-lirr and entity_long-island-committee share identity key entity_mta-long-island-rail-rd.

source_evidence.quote: MTA Long Island Rail Road operates commuter rail service
inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: The Long Island Rail Road agency and the Long Island Committee are related but distinct. Committee references are oversight/meeting context, not the railroad agency identity.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Preserve agency-vs-committee separation even when meeting documents use both names in one phrase.

messages: Global entity records entity_annual-report-2021-mtapd and entity_meeting-doc-113891-john-mueller share identity key entity_john-j-mueller.
Global entity records entity_annual-report-2021-mtapd and entity_meeting-doc-113891-john-mueller share identity key entity_john-mueller.

source_evidence.quote: Provided systemwide policing through the MTA Police Department (MTAPD)
MTAPD Chief of Police John Mueller

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: MTAPD is an agency; John Mueller is a person/Chief of Police. The person-name keys on the agency record are contamination from leadership mentions.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep law-enforcement agency identities distinct from named chiefs or project managers.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_finance-committee-mta and entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr share identity key entity_finance-committee.

source_evidence.quote: Minutes of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority Finance Committee Meeting
AGENCY: MTA Metro-North Railroad ("MNR")

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: The MTA Finance Committee is a board committee; Metro-North Railroad is an operating agency. Shared Finance Committee key on the Metro-North record is approval-workflow contamination.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Approval routing through a Finance Committee does not make an agency the committee.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-102746-committee and entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr share identity key entity_metro-north-commuter-railroad-company.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-102746-committee and entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr share identity key entity_metro-north-commuter-railroad-company-metro-north.

canonical_evidence.display_name: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad

source_evidence.quote: The Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company MTA Metro-North Railroad MNR

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: The Metro-North operations committee oversees/monitors the railroad; it is not the same entity as Metro-North Railroad itself.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Committee charter language naming the railroad should not create committee-to-agency identity merges.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-111791-michael-baker and entity_meeting-doc-164901-iec share identity key entity_independent-engineering-consultant.

source_evidence.quote: Michael Baker INTERNATIONAL
Sirish Peyyetti, Program Director of the IEC

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Michael Baker International is a named firm; the one-source IEC record is a generic Independent Engineering Consultant role/context with a program director mention. The shared IEC key is role contamination, not proof of the same named firm.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Only merge IEC records into Michael Baker when the source explicitly identifies Michael Baker as the IEC in that record.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_joint-lirr-metronorth-committee and entity_meeting157646-joint-committee share identity key entity_joint-long-island-rail-rd-and-metro-north-railroad-committees.

canonical_evidence.display_name: Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad Committees

source_evidence.quote: JOINT LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD COMMITTEE
Minutes of the Regular Meeting Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad Committees

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Both records identify the same MTA Board joint LIRR/Metro-North railroad committee; singular/plural committee wording is a meeting-title variant.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Merge only the joint committee identity; keep LIRR agency, Metro-North agency, and their separate committee records distinct.

skipped_review_only.reason: Both records use generic Community Advisory Committee/CAC language, but the evidence points to different project/corridor scopes: Woodhaven 2015 versus Webster/Utica context. Prior notes also flagged this pair for focused corridor review, so no durable DNM was proposed here.

The left record is Bloomberg as a news/source label; the right record is Bloomberg terminals/communication/data-license procurement text. They may both ultimately belong to Bloomberg L.P., but the current record evidence is too thin for either merge or DNM.

The left record is clearly Bridges and Tunnels Committee Members; the right source says generic Committee Chair & Members and then MTA Finance. This looks like a false friend, but the right record needs source-local committee identification before a durable guard.

The exact Department of Buses versus NYCT financial-record false friend was already present in earlier review/override work; identity222 keeps the fresh Department of Buses guards scoped to still-useful exact pairs.

Likely same Metro-North agency family, but prior notes warned that meeting_doc_124881 is heavily contaminated with Finance Committee, LIRR, and NYCT keys. Needs a cluster-aware Metro-North target-selection pass.

These are NYCT committee/member/work-plan shapes, but member-list snapshots, committee charters, and operations-committee names are mixed. Kept review-only so a later NYCT committee policy pass can distinguish same committee identity from roster snapshots and committee-on-operations variants.

blockers: No provider-backed, materialize, validate, export, canonical/generated-output, override, LOG, manifest, DB, or wiki mutation was performed.
data/identity-review candidate files are useful validator evidence but predate some identity221 cleanup; direct override checks were used to avoid knowingly duplicating already-applied exact guards.
commands_run: rg -n "identity222|identity221|duplicate_global_identity|Lisa Sorin|Catherine Sheridan|Community Advisory Committee|Webster|Department of Buses|Crichlow|John Mueller|Long Island Committee|Bloomberg|IEC|Joint LIRR|Metro-North" .
rg --files data/review_notes data/campaigns data/validation data | rg '(identity|duplicate|review|validation|batch222|221|220|latest|issues|manifest)'

rg -n "Lisa Sorin|Catherine Sheridan|Community Advisory Committee|Department of Buses|Crichlow|Long Island Committee|John Mueller|Finance Committee|Bloomberg|Independent Engineering Consultant|Committee Chair and Members|Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North|Joint LIRR" raw/sources data/canonical wiki/entities wiki/sources -g 'blocks.jsonl' -g '*.jsonl' -g '*.md'

jq -r '.pairs.entity[]? | select(type=="object") | select((.record_ids|index("entity_department-of-buses")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_audit-committee-sorin")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_catherine-sheridan-115226")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_annual-report-2021-lirr")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_long-island-committee")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_annual-report-2021-mtapd")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_meeting-doc-113891-john-mueller")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_meeting-doc-111791-michael-baker")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_meeting-doc-164901-iec")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_meeting-doc-205631-committee-chair-members")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_meeting157646-joint-committee"))) | [(.record_ids|join(" <> ")), .reason, .source_decision] | @tsv' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
